input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The failing existing tests use org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps, which are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; this is an API-removal/test-update issue, not a missing setup dependency.

Pekko documentation lists pekko-testkit as an optional test dependency for idiomatic actor testing, but it is not required before meaningful coverage is reachable and would add another Pekko artifact to the test classpath.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete external setup is required: pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 has only scala-library and com.typesafe:config as normal transitive dependencies, and meaningful ActorSystem/Props/dispatcher/serialization coverage can be written without Docker, extra services, or required environment/system properties.
